outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: The U.S. military says it will blockade Iranian ports as Iran peace talks collapse
outlets.summary: NPR covers CENTCOM blockade beginning Monday, collapse of Islamabad talks after 21 hours. Trump attacks Pope Leo XIV. Oil surges above $102.

outlets.name: PBS NewsHour
outlets.headline: Failed U.S.-Iran negotiations raise questions about fragile ceasefire
outlets.summary: PBS covers failed negotiations, CENTCOM blockade of Iranian ports starting Monday, and fact-checks Trump/Hegseth claims of victory.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US blockade of Iranian ports begins Monday, CENTCOM confirms
outlets.summary: Fox covers CENTCOM blockade confirmed for Monday. Iran could deploy Houthis to block Bab al-Mandeb. Steve Forbes op-ed: 'Finish Iran now or accept strategic defeat.'

outlets.name: Fox News (Op-Ed)
outlets.headline: America faces a stark choice: Finish Iran now or accept strategic defeat
outlets.summary: Steve Forbes argues US must finish the job in Iran. Frames blockade as necessary but insufficient — calls for decisive military action.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US military threatens to blockade all Iranian ports starting on Monday
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers CENTCOM blockade confirmed for Monday 10am ET. IRGC threatens 'deadly vortex.' Oil surges above $103. Trump attacks Pope Leo XIV. Allies reject blockade.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Oil prices surge past $103 a barrel after US announces blockade of Iran
outlets.summary: Oil surges to $103 intraday. Brent +7.3%, WTI +8.5%. BCA Research warns of 'oil cliff' by April 19 as SPR reserves and sanctions exemptions expire.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu touts achievements while JD Vance faces stalled Iran talks
outlets.summary: JPost covers Netanyahu's victory rhetoric vs failed diplomacy. CENTCOM blockade Monday. 2 IDF soldiers wounded in Lebanon. Netanyahu trial delayed again.

outlets.name: Israel Hayom
outlets.headline: Trump declares naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz after Iran nuclear talks collapse
outlets.summary: Israel Hayom covers Trump blockade declaration. Netanyahu visits troops. Operation Silver Plow continues.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: IRGC warns deadly whirlpool for enemies at Hormuz
outlets.summary: PressTV covers IRGC drone surveillance footage. Claims 'complete control' of Hormuz. Warns military vessels = ceasefire violation. Rezaei: 'major untouched levers.'

outlets.name: Xinhua/Iran
outlets.headline: Gaining Iran's trust sole way for U.S. to find exit from standoff
outlets.summary: Xinhua covers Ghalibaf's post-talks statement: US failed to gain Iran's trust. Pezeshkian ready for 'balanced deal.' Iran framing: US caused failure.
